About this home

The WOW FACTOR – a PERFECT TEN! When one combines the exceptional floor

specs_ld.name: 211 Honey Creek Ct #6
specs_ld.description: The WOW FACTOR – a PERFECT TEN! When one combines the exceptional floorplan, the show-stopping view, the impeccable contemporary design, a list of upgrades beyond all others, a location to die for in the best schools and near Lake Travis, shopping and major roads, with an amazingly affordable price tag the result is your new home. The 3/2.5/2 Lantana is the largest floorplan in Honey Creek with breathtaking views of Texas Hill Country, the city of Lakeway, and environs beyond. These Santa Barbara-style up scale, free-standing condos are truly lock and leave with the HOA taking full care of all of the front yards including watering, and backyard mowing. Living, dining, kitchen and master are on the upper floor to take advantage of the views. Lower level includes two great sized bedrooms, bath, laundry and lots of storage along with the 2-car attached garage. Beyond the basic home the owners have added over $50,000 in enhancements. Structurally, the beams in the living room were added, a doggy door and ramp to the backyard, and full gutters. Design wise, all of the flooring, light fixtures, front door, kitchen counters, closet shelving , and accent paint were upgraded. The backyard was fully fenced by the homeowner. Patio, gravel walkway, and edging were all added after move in. Builder extended the backyard of this home to accommodate a slight boundary change in the front yard so the yard extends beyond some of the others. Shopping is 5 minutes away, major roads to downtown, Lake Travis and Texas Hill Country are all within immediate access. Schools are renowned for academics, fine arts, athletics, and engineering and technology. Yes, this purchase is a perfect 10.
